race.comment: NO GREATER VUE (2) ran a much better race last time in a richer grade at Seymour, finishing a close-up fourth. Soft track winner and rarely far away. Long overdue and won't get a better chance to find winning form. COLT FORTY FIVE (4) on the other hand is fresh off a heavy track domination last time at Hamilton, racing on speed and clearing out to score by 3.5 lengths. Can go on with it. QUEEN OF CORDOBA (5) registered her first win when resuming over 1300m at Bendigo, getting home by 1.3 lengths. Sparingly raced and has more to offer. Ryan Hurdle sticks so well worth following up. BOULDER JACK (9) is rarely far away. Speedy type with the inside and will give a sight.
